seoTitle: Stafford County Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Stafford County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 26 last day, holidays, breaks, staff work days, PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: The Stafford County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar includes the first day of school, holidays, breaks, staff work days, professional learning days, parent-teacher conference days, make-up day notes, senior dates, printable PDF download, and an unofficial calendar import for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. Stafford starts the school year with transition day for kindergarten, 6th grade, and 9th grade on August 11, followed by the first day for all grades on August 12. Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Spring Break runs March 22-26, and the last day of school is May 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Stafford County start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Stafford County Public Schools starts all grades on Wednesday, August 12, 2026. Transition day for kindergarten, 6th grade, and 9th grade is Tuesday, August 11.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Stafford County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the Stafford County 2026-2027 calendar runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Stafford County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Stafford County Public Schools is Wednesday, May 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Stafford 2026-2027 dates may be used as make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists February 12, February 15, and March 29 as possible conversion days if make-up time is needed.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Stafford County have school on Labor Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: No. Stafford County Public Schools schedules Labor Day Break from Friday, September 4 through Monday, September 7, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in Stafford County 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Stafford County Public Schools lists 180 instructional days for the 2026-2027 school year.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Stafford County summer break start in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Stafford County summer break starts after the last day of school on Wednesday, May 26, 2027. Staff work days and high school graduations continue after the student year ends.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Stafford County calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides an unofficial one-time Stafford County .ics calendar file generated from the reviewed 2026-2027 calendar records. Families can import it into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook and should still verify updates with Stafford Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: How are Stafford County school closing announcements made?
calendarFaqs.a: Stafford County Public Schools posts weather, emergency, and schedule-change announcements through official district communication channels. Families should check Stafford Schools directly for same-day closures, delayed openings, or make-up day decisions.

yearNumbers.label: Transition Day
yearNumbers.detail: Kindergarten, 6th grade, and 9th grade start one day before the all-grades first day.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Stafford's spring break moves one week earlier than the 2025-2026 calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Potential Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: The PDF lists February 12, February 15, and March 29 as dates that may be converted if instructional time is short.

yearNumbers.label: Senior Dates
yearNumbers.detail: The student calendar lists May 21 as the last day for seniors, May 24 for senior walks, and May 28-29 for high school graduations.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The all-grades first day remains August 12.
Spring Break moves from March 30-April 3 in 2026 to March 22-26 in 2027.
The last day moves from May 28 in 2026 to May 26 in 2027.
